steps.title: Set up the percentage relationship
steps.content: The June price is p% of the May price, so: $$(p/100) \times 18.75 = 20.25$$

steps.title: Verify the answer with backsolving
steps.content: Backsolving by testing the candidate (108): $1.08 \times 18.75 = 20.25$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
